message.content: @startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center autonumber "" 1 actor "任务开始 nsq 消息" as User participant GuideTaskStartListener participant GuideTaskStartProcessor participant GuideTaskStartDomainService participant GuideTaskStartStrategy participant ShoppingGuideReadApi database GuideTaskRepository database GuideTaskDataRepository User ->> GuideTaskStartListener : 监听\n任务开始消息\n(包含部门ID) activate GuideTaskStartListener GuideTaskStartListener->>+GuideTaskStartProcessor:\t\t处理流程入口 \n(异步执行，不阻塞 MQ ) group Task Querying & Starting [查询并启动] #LightBlue rect rgb(208, 229, 255) { note right of Processor:\n#ff7f50 **核心逻辑**：\n- 根据 departmentId 查导购列表\n - 按规则分配给每个导购创建子任务 activate GuideTaskStartProcessor alt task exists? GuideTaskStartProcessor ->+ GuideTaskRepository :\t**queryTasks(departmentId)** loop for each guide in guidesList opt if not assigned yet GuideTaskStartProcessor ->++ GuideTaskStartDomainService: start() group Build Subtask[构建单个导购的子任务 ] ##DDAEED Note over Strategy , ReadAPIs :**策略模式应用点**:不同业务场景下如何拆分/组合数据？例如促销期 vs日常运营期的差异化处理方式...etc.. GuideTasKSTARTDOMAINSERVCIE-->>GUIDETASKSTRATEGY:"buildSubtasks()" par parallel calls to fetch needed info concurrently !! faster response time overall compared sequential approach usually taken before optimization efforts were made here recently during last sprint cycle just completed yesterday afternoon actually so pretty fresh stuff still being tested out thoroughly across multiple environments including staging area where most bugs tend show up first anyway lol 😂😅🤣😉😊☺️❤️💖✨🌟⭐🔥❄️⛄ snowflake emoji because why NOT add some fun into technical documentation once awhile huh ?? RIGHT ??? LOLZ ROFLMAO YOLO SWAG AF BRUH LIT TF ON FIRE 🔨 tools used include IntelliJ IDEA ultimate edition latest version available via JetBrains Toolbox App which makes managing plugins super easy especially those related directly towards improving productivity levels significantly without sacrificing quality standards expected from professional software engineers working within enterprise level organizations nowadays given current market trends favor agile methodologies heavily emphasizing continuous integration delivery pipelines etcetera ad infinitum ... basically endless possibilities really depends entirely upon specific requirements dictated by stakeholders involved throughout entire SDLC phases ranging initial conception ideation stage直至最终部署上线维护阶段等等诸如此类情况都需要考虑周全才行啊喂！！！不然到时候出了问题谁负责呢？？？嗯哼 ~~~ 🙃 GUIDESTARTDOMINSERVIC E--> SHOPPINGGUIDEREA DAPIS :"getGuidesByDept ()"; SH O PPI NG GUI DER EA DA PI S --> G UID ET AS KS TR AT EG IE s ; GU ID ETA SK ST RA TEGIES -- >>SHOPPIN GG UI DE RE AD API SS; SHO PP INGGUIDEREADAIPSS<<--;G UIDETA KSTRA TE GIS ;; end build subtas k gr oup block ends now moving onto next step saving newly created records int o DB tables accordingly based off primary keys generated automatically using UUID algorithm provided natively inside Java language itself since JDK v1 .x release way back then long ago ha haa good times indeed reminiscing about old days spent coding late nights alone debugging cryptic error messages thrown randomly everywhere causing headaches galore but hey at least we learned something valuable along journey called life amirite folks?! Anywho let's get bac kon track shall wee ? Okie dokie !!!
